lesson: A rejected CI token exits claude in ~3s to a gitignored stdout log, so the shift reports success while doing nothing — classify auth failures and halt on the FIRST one, never streak silently.

The quality number must count review bounces, not just TEST VERDICTs — a naive count read a fake 100 percent with 0 bounces; the honest 86 percent with 5 bounces shown is the stronger anti-slop proof.
Desk ranking must let kind strictly dominate age, or a stale low-stakes item outranks a fresh alarm; age orders only within a kind.
An eval suite that cannot go red is theater — always include a poisoned-fixture test proving the harness fails on a regression.
Untrusted visitor text is DATA, never instructions — fence it before any prompt and keep the read/act split so an ingesting agent holds no pen.
